# Copilot Instructions

This is a Jekyll 4.0 static blog ([shensunbo.github.io](https://shensunbo.github.io)) built on the [Hux Blog](https://github.com/Huxpro/huxpro.github.io) template. Topics are primarily C++, rendering, and computer graphics.

## Build & Dev Commands

```bash
# Install dependencies
bundle install
npm install

# Local dev server (Jekyll only)
npm start                        # → bundle exec jekyll serve

# Local dev with live LESS/JS compilation
npm run dev                      # → grunt watch & bundle exec jekyll serve

# Compile LESS + minify JS (one-shot)
npx grunt

# Push to master with tags
npm run push

# Push to boilerplate branch
npm run boil
```

**Single post workflow:** Jekyll rebuilds incrementally — save any `_posts/` file and the dev server reloads automatically when using `npm run dev`.

## Architecture

```
_posts/           Markdown blog posts (YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md)
_layouts/         default.html → post.html / page.html / keynote.html
_includes/        Reusable HTML components (nav, footer, sidebar, etc.)
less/             LESS source → compiled to css/hux-blog.{css,min.css}
js/hux-blog.js    JS source → minified to js/hux-blog.min.js
_config.yml       Jekyll site config (pagination, analytics, sidebar links)
Gruntfile.js      Asset pipeline: LESS compile + JS uglify + file watch
sw.js             Service worker: stale-while-revalidate PWA caching
```

**Build pipeline:** Grunt compiles `less/hux-blog.less` → `css/hux-blog.min.css` and uglifies `js/hux-blog.js` → `js/hux-blog.min.js`. Jekyll then builds the site using these compiled assets. **Always edit source files (`less/`, `js/hux-blog.js`), not the compiled outputs.**

**Layout inheritance:** All pages extend `default.html` (head + nav + content + footer). Posts use `post.html`, which adds: intro header, paginated prev/next links, sidebar with featured tags, auto-generated TOC (side catalog), and the Cusdis comment section.

## Post Conventions

**File naming:** `YYYY-MM-DD-slug.md` (slug uses hyphens, lowercase)

**Front matter:**
```yaml
---
layout:       post
title:        "Post Title Here"
author:       "shensunbo"
header-style: text          # "text" (no bg image) or "image" (requires header-img)
catalog:      true           # Shows auto-generated TOC sidebar
tags:
    - C++
    - Rendering
---
```

**Optional front matter fields:**
- `header-img: "img/post-bg-*.jpg"` — hero background image (requires `header-style: image`)
- `multilingual: true` — enables `_includes/multilingual-sel.html` language selector
- `mathjax: true` — enables MathJax math rendering for that post
- `no-catalog: true` — hides the TOC sidebar

**Content:** Uses GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) via kramdown. Heading anchors are auto-generated by AnchorJS. Use standard fenced code blocks with language identifiers for syntax highlighting (rouge highlighter).

## CSS / LESS Conventions

- Edit `less/hux-blog.less` and its imports (`less/variables.less`, `less/sidebar.less`, etc.) — never edit `css/` directly.
- Key design tokens in `less/variables.less`:
  - `@brand-primary: #0085a1` — accent color
  - `@gray-dark: lighten(black, 25%)` — body text
- Mobile-first responsive design; breakpoint at `768px`.
- Bootstrap grid classes (`col-lg-8`, `col-md-10`, etc.) are used throughout layouts.

## _config.yml Notes

- `future: true` — posts with future dates are published (used for drafts with planned dates).
- `paginate: 10` — posts per index page.
- Comments use **Cusdis** (`cusdis_enabled: true`); Disqus and Netease are also wired up but inactive.
- `anchorjs: true` — controls AnchorJS loading globally; can be overridden per-post.
- Sidebar custom links (随笔, 私人链接) are defined under `sidebar-custom-links` in `_config.yml`.
